all.en: Thank you for submitting your business loan application last week.
all.zh: 感謝您上週提交企業貸款申請。

all.en: We are writing to provide an update on the review progress.
all.zh: 我們在此告知您本案審核進度更新。

all.en: Your application reference number is L K nine eight seven six.
all.zh: 您的申請參考編號為L K九八七六。

all.en: The requested loan amount is two hundred fifty thousand dollars.
all.zh: 申請貸款金額為二十五萬美元。

all.en: The intended use of funds is equipment expansion and working capital.
all.zh: 資金用途為設備擴充與營運週轉。

all.en: Our credit team has completed the initial document review stage.
all.zh: 本行授信團隊已完成初步文件審查階段。

all.en: All required financial statements were received in good order.
all.zh: 所有必要財務報表均已完整收齊。

all.en: Tax returns for the past three years have been verified.
all.zh: 過去三年之稅務申報資料已驗證完畢。

all.en: Personal guarantees from listed signatories have been validated.
all.zh: 所列簽署人之個人保證已驗證完成。

all.en: The collateral appraisal is currently being conducted by an external partner.
all.zh: 擔保品估價現由外部夥伴執行中。

all.en: We expect appraisal results to be available within ten business days.
all.zh: 估價結果預期於十個營業日內出爐。

all.en: Additional documentation may be requested after appraisal review.
all.zh: 估價審閱後可能要求補件。

all.en: Preliminary indications support a favorable credit decision.
all.zh: 初步跡象顯示授信決定傾向核准。

all.en: Final approval still depends on appraisal and committee sign off.
all.zh: 最終核准仍取決於估價與委員會簽核。

all.en: Proposed interest rates are subject to current market conditions.
all.zh: 建議利率將依當前市場狀況調整。

all.en: The term sheet will outline rate, term, and covenants in detail.
all.zh: 授信條件書將詳述利率、期限與限制條款。

all.en: Closing costs and origination fees will be disclosed before signing.
all.zh: 成交費用與開辦費將於簽約前揭露。

all.en: Funds disbursement typically occurs within five days of execution.
all.zh: 撥款通常於簽約後五日內辦理。

all.en: Please keep your contact information current for timely updates.
all.zh: 請維持聯絡資訊更新以便即時通知。

all.en: Your dedicated relationship manager remains available for questions.
all.zh: 專屬關係經理可隨時回應您的疑問。

all.en: We will issue another status update by the end of next week.
all.zh: 我們將於下週週末前再次發送進度通知。

all.en: Thank you for choosing our institution for your financing needs.
all.zh: 感謝您選擇本行作為您融資需求之合作夥伴。

all.en: Quarterly reporting requirements will commence once the loan agreement is finalized.
all.zh: 貸款合約簽訂後將開始執行每季報告之要求。

all.en: Insurance coverage on financed equipment must list our bank as loss payee.
all.zh: 融資設備之保險須將本行列為受益人。

all.en: Prepayment of principal is permitted without penalty after the first year.
all.zh: 本金提前還款於第一年期滿後可免收違約金。

all.en: Interest rate adjustments follow the benchmark plus a fixed spread arrangement.
all.zh: 利率調整依基準利率加固定利差之方式辦理。

all.en: Borrowers must maintain minimum debt service coverage ratios throughout the loan term.
all.zh: 借款人於貸款期間須維持最低償債備付比率。

all.en: Annual reviews assess compliance with all financial and operational covenants.
all.zh: 年度檢視將評估各項財務與營運限制條款之遵循狀況。

all.en: Online loan servicing tools allow you to view balances and schedule payments.
all.zh: 線上貸款服務工具讓您查看餘額並排定還款。

all.en: Refinancing options become available after the third anniversary of disbursement.
all.zh: 撥款滿三週年後即可選擇再融資方案。

all.en: Our commercial banking team welcomes referrals from satisfied existing clients.
all.zh: 本行企業金融團隊歡迎滿意之既有客戶介紹新客戶。

all.en: We look forward to supporting your continued growth in the coming years.
all.zh: 我們期待於未來數年持續支持貴公司穩健成長。

all.en: Loan proceeds may not be used for purposes outside the approved business plan.
all.zh: 貸款款項不得用於核准營運計畫範圍以外之用途。

all.en: Quarterly financial statements are required within forty five days of period end.
all.zh: 季度財務報表須於期末後四十五日內提交。

all.en: Material changes in ownership require prior written consent from the bank.
all.zh: 重大股權變動須事先取得本行書面同意。

all.en: Site visits by our credit team will be scheduled at least once annually.
all.zh: 本行授信團隊將於每年至少安排一次實地拜訪。

all.en: Late payment penalties begin to accrue after the standard fifteen day grace period.
all.zh: 逾期付款違約金於標準十五天寬限期後開始計收。

all.en: Loan modifications may be considered if business circumstances change significantly.
all.zh: 如營運狀況發生重大變化可考慮辦理貸款條件變更。

all.en: Default events trigger immediate review and potential acceleration of outstanding balances.
all.zh: 違約事件將觸發即時審查並可能加速到期未償餘額。

all.en: Borrower covenants include restrictions on additional indebtedness without prior approval.
all.zh: 借款人限制條款包含未經事前核准不得增加負債之規定。

all.en: Loan closing typically takes place at our regional commercial banking office.
all.zh: 貸款簽約通常於本行區域企業金融分行辦理。

all.en: Customer satisfaction surveys are sent following each major milestone in the relationship.
all.zh: 客戶滿意度調查將於合作關係之每項重要里程碑後寄發。
